case_title: ALBERTO CAMPOS RIVERA VS. CRUNCH FITNESS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CRUNCH FITNESS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, ALBERTO CAMPOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUNCH FITNESS $2,760.49 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,835.49, DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYEE APPLIED A FORGED SIGNATURE TO A MEMBERSHIP CONTRACT. I AWARD $760.49 IN ACTUAL DAMAGES UNDER CIV CODE 1770(A)(14); PLAINTIFF AUTHORIZED A CHARGE OF $829.63 FOR 12 MONTHS' GYM USE AND PERSONAL TRAINING AND USED ONE MONTH. I AWARD $2000.00 IN PUNITIVE DAMAGES BASED ON DEFENDANT'S UNAUTHORIZED APPLICATION OF PLAINTIFF'S SIGNATURE TO THE ELECTRONIC GYM MEMBERSHIP CONTRACT. PUNITIVE DAMAGES AUTHORIZED BY CIV CODE 1780(A)(4). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RIVERA, ALBERTO CAMPOS AS TO DEFENDANT CRUNCH FITNESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CRUNCH FITNESS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CRUNCH FITNESS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF ALBERTO CAMPOS RIVERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CRUNCH FITNESS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANITA CASEY REGINAL DIRECTOR OF SALES WEST COAST, DIEGO MONTOYA GENERAL MANAGER, CHRISTINE STOKES FITNESS MANAGER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON DEFENDANT. DEFENDANTS WAIVE PROOF OF SERVICE TO PROCEED WITH THE MATTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUNCH FITNESS
